percentageOrder.title: Percentage off order
percentageOrder.desc: Take a percent off the customer’s full order total.

fixedOrder.title: Amount off order
fixedOrder.desc: Subtract a fixed amount from the order total.

percentageItems.title: Percentage off products
percentageItems.desc: Discount matching products by a percentage.

fixedItems.title: Amount off products
fixedItems.desc: Discount matching products by a fixed amount.

buyget.title: Buy X get Y
buyget.desc: When shoppers buy enough items, they get others free.

freeShipping.title: Free shipping
freeShipping.desc: Remove shipping cost on eligible orders.
